notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-291 — thanks for testing! NEW THIS BUILD — 📋 My trading rules now has an ON/OFF master switch at the top of the rules page: flip it OFF and the whole feature goes dormant (practice buys stop auto-filling your 🎯/🛑 and the 🔔 briefing stops flagging rule breaches) while your saved numbers are kept for later — please try it both ON and OFF and tell me it behaves. ALSO IN THIS RUN (v282–v291) — search a ticker while a report is open and it now NARROWS that report instead of wiping it; ☀️/🌙 light & dark theme toggle (top bar); ⛶ full-screen button (Esc to exit); the 🔔 'What's changed for me' briefing no longer re-popping after you close it; two new reports 🕳 Gap Report and 🧱 Strong Trends; a sticky 💧 Liquidity floor that survives every scan; and a security tighten on announcement headlines. Anything odd, confusing or brilliant — especially around the rules ON/OFF and the search-in-report behaviour — use the ✉ feedback link in the top-left. Your data stays in its own BETA space, separate from any released copy.
